review_title: A set of tools that keeps your data safe.
description: Bitdefender is a great tool that gives us confidence that our data is safe when our partners browse the internet and download large databases to work with. Its price is low compared to the benefits it provides. I really recommend this product especially for SMEs and personal use.
author: Diego Martin R.
pros: The most valuable features that our team like are those related to the anonymous and safe browsing. Bitdefender is also easy to use and automatically reduce its resources usage when you are working.
cons: I would really like this product was faster when analyze our systems. Usually it can take until 9 hours and this process has a great impact in our resources performance.

review_title: One of the best AVs out there
description: As an MSP, we have been using Bitdefender for over 2 years now. It sends emails to our monitoring team to notify us of potential events so that we can respond as needed. No need to stare at a dashboard to monitor endpoints. It integrates with our RMM well and is extremely customizable based on our clients' individual needs.
author: Paul A.
pros: I can set it and forget it. Monitoring made simple. Integrates with other tools well. Can easily automate installation.
cons: It is VERY protective by default, but is easily configurable to fit the needs of the endpoint.

review_title: Not a good option for SMBs without dedicated IT support
description: For a small business owner who cannot afford a dedicated IT support the time requirements to manage GZ to simply install a lot of the software desired for the business cost much more in my time than whatever discount savings I may have obtained. No doubt GZ is great for those with a need to centrally manage their security and/or have the necessary IT support/inclination to manage the policies, etc. However, for a small team (less than 5), setting up individual machines was far quicker, less hassle, and less cost.
author: Nathan M.
pros: It is obviously high end security and is well rated by professional reviewers. However, that security is often too strict and installation of many software packages becomes frustratingly difficult.
cons: I could never simply pause the security protection. No doubt for IT professionals setting up all the necessary components for a power user, end-point policies, etc. is relatively simple. However, I hit brick walls every time I tried. Support articles were frustratingly incomplete, either assuming completion of prior steps, or not achieving desired results when (I believe) following through step by step. No doubt I was missing something meant to already be in place, or misunderstood, or something...

review_title: Bitdefender for the win!
description: My experience with Bitdefender has been amazing. We have a three year contract with them and will defiantly re-knew with another three years.
author: Jose H.
pros: Bitdefender customer response time is impeccable. When it comes to an intrusion notification to a response to a question I have. The response time is unmatched.
cons: One con that comes at the top of my head is the Web-GUI. Especially the part when it comes to whitelisting a website. If the website tabs to a sub-URL but has the beginning matching. Bitdefender does not care it will still block that portion of the website. Which is annoying, but it is still good to see that specifics need to be entered to allow whitelisting.

review_title: Affordable Business Security perfect for SMBs
description: This was my first foray into setting up a SMB Internet Security program, and as such there was a pretty steep learning curve for me to figure out what the do's and don'ts of setup are. However, once it was set up it very much takes care of itself with minimal interaction from me. I occasionally have to whitelist certain things, or adjust a couple of settings here and there, but for the most part we've been running it for a little over three years with no incidents.
author: Matthew C.
pros: Once it is set up, GravityZone takes a very hands-off approach to Internet Security. It was easy to install and it updates regularly without having to manually push updates. It is a large program, but it doesn't use a ton of system resources, which is great because some of our hardware is older.
cons: Initial setup was a bit complicated. I had to contact them a few times in order to get all my bearings with the program.

review_title: Excellent business antivirus solution
description: I have used Bitdefender for several years both for my internal computers and also for all of my clients. I manage endpoints via the gravity zone online portal when it comes to deploying new devices and managing existing ones.
author: David S.
pros: I love how functional Bitdefender is, how it will run on client devices with minimal impact or disruption to the client and also how wasy it is to deploy and manage endpoints from a centralised portal.
cons: I sometimes find the dashboard complicated and sometimes things are hard to find such as when I am trying to exclude a file from scanning modules or temporarily disable antivirus protection on a particular endpoint.

review_title: Simplified, not simple security tool
description: Very easy to get running with very little issues. I don't actually know how much it's doing, but my business has yet to have any attacks!
author: Derek J.
pros: It's easy to get going, but also has the nitty gritty depth and controls an admin wants. I wasn't that versed in IT security software, but when we switched it was very easy to purchase, distribute, and get going. It's almost set it and forget it after that if you don't make any changes.
cons: There are some features that get disabled at different tiers that seem arbitrary or were available and no longer are at the low tier. When this happens, the clients think they should still have the feature and start throwing security risk messages.

review_title: Great anti virus product
description: Fantastic product. Would highly recommend
author: David S.
pros: Ease of use. Easy to navigate, easy to install
cons: It just seems to work, so no real issues

review_title: Good protection, but slow response on software bugs
description: Besides the two major bugs I've encountered, my experience has been good in the 5 years I've been using this software. The Android app is solid and quite fast, and support is attentive.
author: Andrés J G.
pros: Generally speaking, the software is weel designed and with many normal features. It's not pricey and you will be able to use it across multiple Windows, Mac, iOS and Android devices.
cons: When they release a version with a bug, they take forever to fix it. In 2020 a bug on the Mac version made the software freeze and made the Mac slower. There were active threads on the companies' forums, and it took them over 3 months to fix this issue. And in 2021, a bug automatically boots the VPN app on Mac, even though they have the option to turn this off. This bug was reported at least in early February 2021, the company acknowledge the issue and in mid-September 2021 they haven't been able to fix this simple issue. Also, the VPN app is a paid feature, which would be better to include in the normal subscription package. If not, it would be better to leave this app away of the offering, and instead, make it an optional download.

review_title: Great price but lacking functionality.
description: Great early on, the price is fantastic, but we wanted more functionality,
author: Michael D.
pros: Bitdefender is easy to install and provision. Creating the profile was easy as well.
cons: We felt like the product has decreased in functionality and is closer to consumer grade Antivirus product.

review_title: One of the best antivirus, antimalware, products in the market
description: One of the few software products that actually work, and work well in the background without constant interruptions, or requiring constant attention. The scanning of a complete system can be done very quickly and unobtrusively. Warnings appear only when there is an actual potential problem, otherwise the software works very well and very effectively. We just wish that all software programs worked in a similar fashion.
author: Walter P.
pros: Very easy to install and use. Non intrusive unless there is an issue. The price is very reasonable and support is always available.
cons: Compared to other anti-virus and anti-software programs, this one does not appear to have any problems or flaws that would detract from its use.

review_title: Great easy to use product with strong management and reporting
description: Overall a great platform that ticks all the boxes with strong features.
author: Mark B.
pros: The security advice and automated remediation. The isolation and investigation features are great.
cons: Lack of support for mobike devices within platform.

review_title: Best antivirus protection
description: The problem that Bitdefender solves is that I don't worry about intrusions and infections. I still need to keep on my colleagues about email phishing (no package can prevent social engineered attacks) but as far as website and file downloads, I feel secure and protected. Peace of mind is worth the price and more.
author: Don B.
pros: Best rated antivirus and is light on computer resources. Too many of the best known antivirus packages are resource hogs that slow down your system. Bit defender is light weight and still able to provide top-rated protection. It also has a suite of add-ons like VPN, ransomware protection and payment protection. Highly recommended!
cons: The license covers 3 computers. The process to install it on multiple systems is a bit clunky but not impossible to use.

review_title: Strong anti malware software
description: Very good results. I saw that this software scored in the upper 90's 2024 efficacy test
author: Suzanne C.
pros: Strong threat detection as well as threat prevention.
cons: when on the internet, you need a VPN to ensure software will work

review_title: A Good Small Business Antivirus Solution
description: It's a solid and well priced antivirus for a small business. It includes a special ransomware "vaccine" which gives me a bit of peace of mind as ransomware is the new boogey man in the cyber security world. Their support reply promptly and I've never had trouble getting a hold of them. You really have to keep after it and do an audit once a month to make sure there aren't any duplicate instances and that all computers have checked in, but aside from that it's set and forget.
author: James L.
pros: The software is easy to set up and install, and the admin interface is fairly straight forward. They support MFA out of the box and that's essential for an antivirus software. I also appreciate the ability to organize the computers into sub folders that represent my organizations structure. You can apply security policies by folder grouping and this makes it easy to target more exposed groups like customer service or traveling employees with more aggressive security policies. Finally, reports and notifications can be set up to be sent by email which is essential for when infections occur.
cons: The client tends to get confused somewhat frequently. If an employee travels and connects to many different networks the admin console will sometimes show duplicates of that same client and thusly take up 2 licenses. These clones are easy enough to delete, but it's still annoying. The scanning tools are fine for routine scans, but for customer scans you must specify a target on the system. For OS X this is often the root directory for me, and for Windows it's %Win_Dir%. I'd prefer just a "scan the whole machine" checkbox rather than playing around with this. Especially considering I usually do a custom scan when something is going wrong. Each separate admin has their own separate "console" and they have to set it up on their own. This is frustrating when you have more than one admin and each one has to customize and set up their own reports, dashboards, etc. It's also confusing that each admin only sees their own tasks. I can't see what my colleague has issued for scans recently and so I might scan or update the same machine twice for no reason. Generally, being able to see what work a colleague has done, especially in addressing a crisis, is very helpful. They have a patch management "plugin", but it's strictly for Windows. I have a dual OS environment so I am forced to look elsewhere and would prefer a singular endpoint management solution that encompasses patch management and antivirus.

review_title: Lightweight, Intuitive UI, Fast dan Mostly accurate to detecting threat
description: Very helpful and my laptop is not burdened with its performance. All my internet activity becomes very safe because if I make an unsecured connection with a certain site I can see why bitdefender is making this notification.
author: kharisma R.
pros: ease of use, complete features and the ability to overcome threats in a fast time and almost one hundred percent accurate
cons: The vpn bonus given for total security is useless. Because it only provides connection data of 200mb per day

review_title: Complete security suite
description: In General I feel safe as an administrator and user. In the event of any attack, I am certain that it will be identified by Bitdefender and blocked.
author: Armando I.
pros: With Bitdefender I can manage all the computers on my network and provide the necessary security. Comply with the policies of access to company resources and ensure the information as well as foresee the loss of data. Forense Inspection its a very usefull module.
cons: Sometimes the maintenance of the equipment is usually tedious, the browser becomes slow and I have to generate custom reports continuously.

review_title: I find Bitdefender very good
description: I don't have to worry about computer and network security.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I began using this software when my Anti-Virus software provider of many years was forced to change from a previously top-notch product to Bitdefender - I have not been disappointed. I'm no expert in digital security but need good protection and Bitdefender seems to have an excellent record. It is quite easy to use and manage and I've not had any infections or compromised computers - I guess that says something. Support is very quick and professional.
cons: Nothing I can think of that I don't like.

review_title: Best digital security for any organization
author: Zuhairah A.
pros: Bitdefender GravityZone protect all my digital appearance and all my device like my computer and tablet. It has a cloud storage that i can linked on all my device, and create a safe passage if i am transferring files from one device to other.
cons: It work so well on my computer, but i have found several issues when trying to install it to my tablet. It keep showing error and asking me to contacting the customer support. It has solved since then, but a simple operation like installing a software should be simple enough.

review_title: Great Virus Protection Software With Low Price
description: My overall experience with this program is pretty good.We started to use Bitdefender 2 years ago.I had some suspicous regarding implementation adn protection of crical files.But all is göne.Program offering good performance in protection of your computer from virused and malwares without loosing any performance lost
author: Çağrı E.
pros: I like most regarding Bitdefender is user interace.It is really easy. the software providing detailed report after virüs scan. You are recognizing your system is being protected after you review detail report. The secong thing the softawere is avaialble for MaC OS software. .Customer survice is also great.Once I had problem I drop an -email to them and I got quick reply and problem is soved.
cons: After first set up the program,scanning may take too much time.This is the only thing disturbs me

review_title: Worked until it didn't
description: Based on the advice of my point of sale software company I installed Bitdefender onto my server to take care of viruses that got past my other antivirus software that I was using. It worked great until suddenly it became incompatible with the POS software. We had a very frustrating couple of months of having the POS computers freeze up. We ultimately figured out that it was the anti-virus software not working with the POS software. We removed Bitdefender and installed other anti-virus software and our problems stopped. I ultimately blame our POS software for not being capable of working with a major anti-virus software and not the other way around.
author: Andrew L.
pros: I took viruses off of my computer that another anti virus software missed. It did what it said it was going to do.
cons: It stopped working or wasn't compatible with the POS software that I had on my computers. I believe that it was more of an issue with my POS software company's compatibility than an issue with Bitdefender.

review_title: Total Security.
description: Just great to have peace of mind when it comes to online security.
author: Natalie W.
pros: This software is like having a personal guard on your laptop, it does everything to keep your laptop safe and secure in the background without you having to even worry about it or give it a second thought. Once you do the initial set up it seems to work in its own way I guess it just read what you're using and monitors the sites you visit. Very secure have had no issues with viruses or any breaches of security on my laptop.
cons: I did find for a few weeks after I set up the software I had a lot of pop-ups from the software checking if certain sites were ok and when I was using documents or forms asking if I wanted them stored elsewhere or giving additional security but this passes I assume the software learns about your practices and is able to judge what to do with certain things, so I see the pop-ups rarely now.

review_title: The lightest security agent you can find.
description: I have been using this software for years, both personally and in enterprise environments, and it's performance has only improved with time. We have top notch protection against viruses, spam, Trojans, etc. and never have a complaint from any user that has the agent installed in their machines.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It offers really great security for your computers and network environment. And on top of that, it's extremely light on resource consumption, you will never notice is there and it won't slow you down in the slightest.
cons: I can honestly not think of a single negative thing to say about it.

review_title: My REview for Bitdefender GaravityZone
author: Reunaldo P.
pros: I appreciate that Bitdefender GravityZone provides strong defense against viruses, ransomware, and other dangers. Additionally, it offers strong security analytics that let customers immediately spot unusual activity on their networks. Bitdefender GravityZone is a fantastic option for organizations of all sizes because it is simple to adopt and operate.
cons: The occasionally sluggish scanning performance of Bitdefender GravityZone is one of its least preferred features. Also, folks who are not tech-savvy may find the interface's intricacy to be intimidating. Another drawback for consumers who desire more control over their security settings is the lack of customizability.

review_title: Solid antivirus for your MSP business
description: Overall, this is a great product that is compatible with everything we throw on it, including Macs. It's fairly easy to deploy, although the automatic removal of old AV doesn't always work.
author: DANIEL G.
pros: Bit Defender is easy to set up and deploy. You can create a couple of baseline policies, then clone them to customize them for other clients. If you change something in the original policy, it updates all of them so it's easy to manage your exceptions client-wide. It also has great features such as internet blocking by category, blacklist or whitelist, as well as many modules such as an antiransomware "vaccine" which I have not seen anywhere else.
cons: The hardest part of using this is the reporting. We haven't been able to integrate it with Autotask/Datto, so you need to actually log into the dashboard daily.
